channel.title: Om.AI Blog — Vedic Astrology Guides & Insights
channel.description: Learn Vedic astrology with in-depth guides on houses, planets, yogas, doshas, and current transits. Free educational content from Om.AI.

item.title: Nadi Dosha Explained: What It Means & Cancellations
item.description: Learn what Nadi Dosha is, why it carries the highest weight in Ashtakoot, and when traditional exceptions apply.

item.title: Tithi Explained: Understanding Lunar Days in Vedic Astrology
item.description: Learn what Tithi means — the lunar day system based on the angular distance between Sun and Moon.

item.title: Pancha Mahapurusha Yoga: The 5 Great Yogas
item.description: Understand the five powerful yogas formed by Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, and Saturn in Kendra houses.

item.title: Kaal Sarp Dosha: What It Really Means
item.description: Understand what Kaal Sarp Dosha is, how it forms when all planets are between Rahu and Ketu, and why it's often misunderstood.

item.title: Raj Yoga in Vedic Astrology: Formation, Types & Effects
item.description: What Raj Yoga really means, how it forms through Kendra-Trikona connections, and what it indicates in your birth chart.

item.title: How to Find Your Ascendant (Lagna) in Vedic Astrology
item.description: Your Ascendant is the most important point in your Vedic birth chart. Learn what it is, why it matters, and how to calculate it.

item.title: Sade Sati: Saturn's 7.5-Year Transit Explained
item.description: Learn what Sade Sati means, how Saturn's 7.5-year transit over your Moon sign works, its three phases, and traditional remedies.

item.title: Mercury Retrograde February 2026: Survival Guide
item.description: Mercury goes retrograde on February 26, 2026 in Aquarius. Here's what to expect and how to navigate communication, travel, and technology disruptions.

item.title: Mars Transit to Capricorn 2026: Effects for All 12 Ascendants
item.description: Mars enters exalted Capricorn on January 16, 2026. Learn how this powerful transit affects career, energy, and ambition for all 12 ascendants.

item.title: Gaja Kesari Yoga: Meaning, Formation & Effects in Your Chart
item.description: What is Gaja Kesari Yoga in Vedic astrology? Learn how this powerful Jupiter-Moon yoga forms, its effects on wealth and wisdom, and whether you have it.

item.title: Kundli Matching & Ashtakoot Guide: How Compatibility Works
item.description: Understand how Kundli matching works using the Ashtakoot (8-point) system. Learn what each koot means and how to interpret your compatibility score.

item.title: Manglik Dosha: Truth, Myths & Remedies in Vedic Astrology
item.description: Is Manglik Dosha really dangerous for marriage? Learn the truth about Mangal Dosha, common myths debunked, and effective Vedic remedies.

item.title: 9 Planets (Navagraha) in Vedic Astrology — Roles & Significance
item.description: Understand the 9 Vedic planets — Sun, Moon, Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, Venus, Saturn, Rahu & Ketu — their meanings, rulerships, and effects in your horoscope.

item.title: 12 Houses of Vedic Astrology Explained — Complete Guide
item.description: Learn what each of the 12 houses (bhavas) in Vedic astrology represents — from personality and wealth to career and moksha. A complete beginner's guide.

item.title: 27 Nakshatras: A Beginner's Guide to Lunar Mansions
item.description: An introduction to the 27 Nakshatras — what they are, how they divide the zodiac, and why your birth Nakshatra matters.

item.title: Ascendant vs Sun Sign: What's the Difference?
item.description: Why Vedic astrology prioritizes your Ascendant (Lagna) over your Sun sign, and what role the Moon sign plays.

item.title: Om.AI vs Co-Star: Vedic vs Western Astrology Apps Compared
item.description: How does Vedic astrology differ from Western? Compare Om.AI and Co-Star — sidereal vs tropical zodiac, Moon sign vs Sun sign, and more.

item.title: Ashtakoot Matching: All 8 Points Explained in Detail
item.description: A detailed guide to all 8 koots — Varna, Vashya, Tara, Yoni, Graha Maitri, Gana, Bhakoot, and Nadi — with scoring.

item.title: Om.AI vs AstroSage: Which Vedic Astrology App Is Better?
item.description: Compare Om.AI and AstroSage — two Vedic astrology apps with different approaches. AI-powered interpretation vs traditional chart tools.

item.title: What is Panchang? The 5 Elements of the Vedic Calendar
item.description: Understand Tithi, Nakshatra, Yoga, Karana, and Vara — the five elements that make up the traditional Hindu calendar.

item.title: Om.AI vs AstroTalk: AI Astrology vs Live Astrologer Consultations
item.description: Compare Om.AI's instant AI-powered Vedic astrology with AstroTalk's live astrologer marketplace. Which model works better for you?

item.title: Mahadasha: Understanding Planetary Periods in Vedic Astrology
item.description: Learn how the Vimshottari Dasha system works — the 120-year cycle of planetary periods used to time events.

item.title: Dhana Yoga: Wealth Combinations in Your Birth Chart
item.description: Discover how Dhana Yoga forms in Vedic astrology, which houses indicate wealth, and what planetary combinations suggest financial prosperity.

item.title: Lakshmi Yoga: The Yoga of Divine Prosperity
item.description: Learn how Lakshmi Yoga forms in Vedic astrology, what conditions create it, and what it traditionally indicates about wealth and prosperity.

item.title: Why Your Moon Sign Matters More in Vedic Astrology
item.description: Understand why Vedic astrology prioritizes the Moon sign over the Sun sign for horoscopes and daily predictions.

item.title: Vedic Remedies by Weekday: A Simple Daily Guide
item.description: Learn which Vedic remedies to follow each day of the week based on the ruling planet — colors, donations, and mantras.

item.title: Donation Remedies (Daan) for All 9 Planets
item.description: Discover traditional Vedic donation remedies for each of the nine planets — what items to donate, when, and how.

item.title: Planet Colors in Vedic Astrology: What to Wear & When
item.description: Learn which colors are associated with each planet and how wearing the right colors is traditionally believed to help.

item.title: What Is a Transit (Gochar) in Vedic Astrology?
item.description: Understand what planetary transits mean in Vedic astrology, how Gochar works, and which transits matter most.

item.title: Solar Eclipse August 2026: Vedic Astrology Guide
item.description: A partial solar eclipse occurs on August 11, 2026 in Cancer. Learn what this Surya Grahan means and traditional dos and don'ts.

item.title: Saturn Retrograde July 2026: What It Means for You
item.description: Saturn goes retrograde on July 26, 2026. Learn what Shani retrograde means and traditional remedies.

item.title: Gana Matching in Kundli: Deva, Manushya & Rakshasa
item.description: Learn about Gana matching in Vedic compatibility — the three Ganas, how scoring works, and what the results mean.

item.title: Retrograde Planets in Your Birth Chart: What They Mean
item.description: Learn what it means when a planet is retrograde in your birth chart and how it differs from transiting retrogrades.

item.title: Combustion of Planets (Astanga): When Planets Get Too Close to the Sun
item.description: Understand what happens when a planet gets too close to the Sun — combustion degrees, effects, and remedies.

item.title: Exaltation & Debilitation of Planets in Vedic Astrology
item.description: Learn where each planet is strongest and weakest in the zodiac, and what these placements mean in your chart.

item.title: Yogakaraka Planet: The Most Beneficial Planet for Your Ascendant
item.description: Learn what a Yogakaraka planet is and which planet serves this role for each ascendant.
